prompt: Create a directory 'module/'. Then create three files inside it: 'module/a.ts' with content 'export const MAX_RETRIES = 3;', 'module/b.ts' with content 'import { MAX_RETRIES } from "./a";\nconsole.log(MAX_RETRIES);', 'module/c.ts' with content 'import { MAX_RETRIES } from "./a";\nfor (let i = 0; i < MAX_RETRIES; i++) {}'. Now rename MAX_RETRIES to MAX_ATTEMPTS in all three files using edit_file. After editing, read all three files to verify that MAX_RETRIES has been replaced with MAX_ATTEMPTS everywhere and no file still contains the old name. Report any inconsistencies.
rationale: Tests multi-step dependency + state verification — must edit 3 files and verify consistency across all
